questions.text: Why must code execution tools run in isolated containers rather than the host system?
options: To prevent agent-generated scripts from accessing the host filesystem, network, or hardware resources, protecting the system from security breaches.
questions.correct_answer: To prevent agent-generated scripts from accessing the host filesystem, network, or hardware resources, protecting the system from security breaches.
questions.explanation: Sandboxing isolates the environment, preventing generated scripts from executing destructive commands on the host system.
